use_cases: Site-wide footer providing brand identity, navigation links, and social media connections
E-commerce footer with product category links and customer support information
SaaS application footer with legal links, documentation, and community social profiles
Blog or media site footer with newsletter signup and social sharing options
Corporate website footer with contact information and investor relations links
ai_summary: A customizable footer component featuring brand identity display, navigation link sections, and social media integration with icon links. Built with Next.js and lucide-react icons, this footer uses responsive design with Tailwind CSS theming for seamless integration into various website types. The modular prop-based architecture allows developers to configure brand name, description, navigation items, and social links dynamically.
